name: Beyond Up
short_description: Beyond Up is an exhilarating adventure that will push your platforming skills to their limits! Your goal is simple: ascend through a world filled with obstacles, platforms, and unexpected twists, all while defying gravity and conquering your fear of falling.
detailed_description:
Beyond Up is an exhilarating adventure that will push your platforming skills to their limits! Your goal is simple: ascend through a world filled with obstacles, platforms, and unexpected twists, all while defying gravity and conquering your fear of falling.

Do You Have What It Takes?
In Beyond Up, only the brave and determined will reach the top. Whether you're climbing for personal glory or challenging your friends, get ready for a journey full of challenges, frustrations, and triumphs. How far will you go?
